element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns squad selection and basic movement with machine gun infantry
Single-round kills on enemy infantry establish baseline lethality
Initially fragile; player has superior firepower advantage early game
Introduces need for secondary weapons; buildings invulnerable to machine guns
Limited ammunition requires strategic use against buildings and grouped enemies
Homing missile behavior; limited ammo creates resource management tension
Risk-reward: retrieve for ammo vs. destroy for immediate damage
Increases threat level; requires tactical positioning and grenade/rocket use
Stationary threats requiring careful approach and cover positioning
Aerial threat; escalates difficulty and forces defensive tactics
Slows soldiers and disables firing; forces route planning and vulnerability windows
Environmental hazard requiring path awareness; slows movement
Instant kill hazards; require cautious movement and visual identification
Terrain-specific mobility options; varies tactical options by environment
Enemy troops become more powerful as game progresses, eroding early firepower advantage

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe zone or level completion
typical_tension_triggers: Low ammunition status requiring crate retrieval
Escalating enemy infantry strength across missions
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension building through environmental hazards and escalating enemy capability; relief comes from successful building destruction and resource acquisition; overall pacing intensifies mid-game as enemy firepower grows

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Supply crates scattered throughout level; optional destruction for ammo recovery vs. safe retrieval

difficulty_curve.early_game: Player-advantaged with superior machine gun firepower against fragile infantry; introduction of basic mechanics (grenades, squad splitting) in safe contexts
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Enemy infantry firepower escalates; vehicles and turrets introduce new threat types; resource scarcity becomes critical management factor
difficulty_curve.late_game: Enemy infantry reaches parity with player firepower; helicopters and combined arms threats force defensive tactics; ammunition planning essential
notable_spikes: First vehicle encounter (Jeeps/tanks) - requires secondary weapon adoption
Missile turret introduction - establishes cover-based defensive play
Helicopter encounters - forces dispersed squad formation and evasion tactics
Late-game enemy infantry scaling - erodes early-game firepower advantage

notable_level_patterns.description: 72 levels organized across varied settings (jungle, snow, desert) with unique terrain features (igloos, snowmobiles, rivers, quicksand) affecting movement and combat strategy
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Desert missions with quicksand hazards; Snow missions with snowmobiles

notable_level_patterns.description: Enemy-spawning buildings create focal points for squad tactics; invulnerability to machine guns forces grenade/rocket use and ammo conservation planning
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Early-to-mid missions in all terrain types

notable_level_patterns.description: Limited ammunition for grenades and rockets creates risk-reward decisions: retrieve crates safely or destroy them for immediate tactical advantage
Player can split squad into smaller units for separate positioning, reducing casualties in dangerous areas but fragmenting firepower
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Missions requiring turret approach or vehicle threat management
